sourceProject.name: Foodike
sourceProject.description: A Java/Kotlin-based Android mobile application extracted for Cangjie target project configuration generation.

rules.text: Use core fields as the primary source of normalized mobile configuration semantics.
Use reference fields as source evidence only. Do not copy source-specific field names into the target configuration unless the target generator explicitly supports them.
Convert diagnostics into warnings, TODO items, or manual review notes in generated migration output.

values.value: Choose from a range of restaurants and hotels near you
Vaccinated delivery partners ensure the health and security of the customer
Fast and easy to track delivery to ease the experience of the customer
Add, edit and delete saved addresses

diagnostics.message: The source build system uses script-based configuration. Some values may depend on build-time evaluation.
